title: 理論とインスティンクト

text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is a racer who loves formulating theories on how
events will play out. But sometimes, pure chance dictates the
outcome—much like our chance meeting.
One day, while walking behind the school...

Something falls from above. It glitters in the light, reflecting the
setting sun.
I'm so sorry! You're not hurt, are you?

I hear a sharp, clear voice overhead. Looking up, there's an
Umamusume poking out from a classroom window.
Yes! My apologies—I was lost in thought, and they must've fallen off.
choice_data_list: No problem, I'll bring them up to you!

text_block_list.text: You will? That'd be much appreciated!
I carry the glasses up to the classroom where the student is waiting.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good... The hinges move without issue. And the lenses appear to be
unblemished.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
These are tailor-made for racing. Naturally, their material is able to
withstand quite a bit of wear and tear.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Meaning, in theory, the fall from only a second-story window should
not damage them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, the possibility remained that a runner might inadvertently
trample them. Your assistance, though, reduced that chance to zero.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You have my thanks. Now I will not be hindered tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, with that badge on your collar, I suspect you're a trainer. Then
I'm sure you are well aware of the tryouts tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's where Umamusume aiming to debut will exhibit their abilities
to trainers in the hopes of being scouted.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And in the tenth race, I—Biwa Hayahide—will be participating.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Rather, I must participate. There is something I have to accomplish in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So, needless to say, I will seize this opportunity for victory—and my
chance to make my debut.

Although she speaks calmly, I feel her unwavering confidence, her
eyes smoldering with iron will.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I suppose... I can reveal one thing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In tomorrow's race, I'll stay near the lead until the final corner. The
front pack will be tightly grouped together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Following the last turn, I'll pass them from outside.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Then I will gain a lead of no less than ten lengths—and place first.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That is the result I've derived from my calculations. Whether it proves
true or not... you should confirm tomorrow with your own eyes.

Biwa Hayahide's calculations are both composed and daring at the
same time. But will the outcome really be as she predicts?

Having grown curious, I come to see the tryouts the next day to see
how her races pan out.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers are in a heated battle right out of the gate! The spotlight's
on Biwa Hayahide, who's gotten a favorable position in the front!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: All according to my predictions.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The front pack is heading into the third corner! It's a close fight
between the leaders!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Three... two... one.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Time to confirm my calculations!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're out of the corner and into the final straight! Biwa Hayahide
comes in from the outside! Biwa Hayahide takes the lead! She's two
lengths ahead! Now three!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Biwa Hayahide places first! She wins it by a landslide! What an
overwhelming victory!

I feel a chill run down my spine as I watch Biwa Hayahide's prediction
play out word for word!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was some show, Biwa Hayahide! You had plenty to
spare—almost like you had it all planned out.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hey, look! Is that who I think it is?!

Such formidable abilities should be getting Biwa Hayahide scouting
requests from all sides. But suddenly, an unexpected visitor arrives...
Nice run.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, Brian. Here to spectate?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I was just passing by.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! It's the Beast, Narita Brian! I've heard she's pretty elusive,
but here she is—right in front of me!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: Holy hotcakes, what am I waitin' for! Brian! I'd love to have a talk!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch, the rats are squeaking... Later, Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: One moment, Brian. You appear... thinner than usual.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you not meeting your dietary requirements? Is your nutritional
intake sufficient?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Lay off of me. I'm eating just fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm. I think I understand. The recent changes to the cafeteria menu
are not to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You've always been far too picky an eater. Listen, our energy
consumption is exceptional, and—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ugh! You're so bigheaded about everything!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What?! M-my head is NOT large! To the contrary, it is of average
proportions... Brian!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Goodness... She can be so stubborn.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Wait up, Brian! The Triple Crown sure would look glorious on you!
And I can help you get it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: There is still room to improve my theories.

It turns out that Biwa Hayahide, who runs with calculated precision, is
also the older sister of the racer dubbed the "Beast."

Strangely, I find myself drawn to her. I feel a growing curiosity within
me, wanting to know more about this intriguing runner.
